title: 168 hours x week
content:
168 hours x week

56 hours x sleep
9 hours x grad class
3 hours x enc
10 hours x ucew
21 hours x relaxation
5 hours x meditation
3 hours x exercise
10 hours x eating

51 hours x week left over


Monday is edit and review day

Use an app to create social posts throughout the week

Write songs on piano, write out scales

Do 5 covers:
1. HUNGRY HEART
2. ANGEL WITH THE SCABBED WINGS
3.
4.
5.

Bike pump

Listen to AT LEAST one new album weekly
Listen to current music and interact within community AT LEAST once a week

Organize notes in documents folder for school
Each class gets its own folder
Ex: Translation--->notes--->01.12.15(notes of that day)


PAINT
